old_value: {"id":"agenthive-a29.1","title":"US-001: Hook registration with Claude Code","description":"As a developer using AgentHive I want safety hooks to be automatically registered with Claude Code in each agent worktree So that the destructive-guard and check-chat hooks actually protect my codebase when agents run with `--dangerously-skip-permissions`","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z"}

new_value: Implemented hook registration: hive init now creates .claude/settings.json in each agent worktree, mapping safety hooks to PreToolUse, coordination hooks to UserPromptSubmit+PostToolUse, and custom hooks to PreToolUse

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-a29.2","title":"US-002: Hook files shipped in compiled builds","description":"As a developer installing AgentHive via `npm install -g` I want hook shell scripts to be included in the compiled distribution So that `hive init` can copy working hooks instead of silently installing nothing","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z"}

new_value: Embedded hook scripts as string constants in src/hooks/embedded.ts, updated copyHooks() to use writeFileSync with warning on missing hooks, added postbuild script to copy .sh files to dist/hooks/

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-a29.3","title":"US-003: Shell injection prevention in tmux commands","description":"As a developer with a custom session name in config.yaml I want tmux commands to be safe from shell injection So that a session name or agent name containing shell metacharacters cannot execute arbitrary commands","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z"}

new_value: Shell injection prevention: replaced all execSync tmux calls with execFileSync via shared tmux helper, added shellQuote for loop command paths

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-a29.4","title":"US-004: Honest error message when .hive/ already exists","description":"As a developer running `hive init` in an already-initialized repo I want an accurate error message that tells me what I can actually do So that I'm not directed to a nonexistent `hive add` command","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z"}

new_value: Replaced misleading hive add reference with honest guidance to edit config.yaml and use git worktree add

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-a29.5","title":"US-005: Working `--raw` flag on `hive config`","description":"As a developer debugging config parsing issues I want `hive config --raw` to show the unprocessed config.yaml contents So that I can compare raw input vs resolved output to identify default-merging issues","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z"}

new_value: Implemented --raw flag for hive config: reads and prints raw config.yaml without resolving defaults, supports --json for JSON output, rejects --raw --agents as mutually exclusive

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-a29.6","title":"US-006: Model field in generated config","description":"As a developer running `hive init` for the first time I want the generated `config.yaml` to include `model: sonnet` in the defaults section So that `hive config` shows the correct model and I can see what model my agents will use without checking source code","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:21Z"}

new_value: Added model: sonnet to defaults in buildConfig() so generated config.yaml includes the model field

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-ady","title":"Terminal UI","description":"An interactive terminal UI (TUI) for AgentHive that provides real-time monitoring, dispatching, and control of multi-agent orchestration sessions. The TUI is an additive layer — all functionality remains available via individual CLI commands. It consolidates `hive status`, `hive tail`, and `hive dispatch` into a single persistent dashboard. Target framework: ink (React for CLIs) due to TypeScript compatibility, component model, and flexbox layout.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:36Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:36Z","external_ref":"prd:tasks/prd-terminal-ui.md"}

new_value: Implemented full Terminal UI with ink/React: 7 user stories covering TUI framework scaffold, live status panel, live chat panel, dispatch input bar, agent detail view, keyboard navigation, and cost overview bar

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-ady.1","title":"US-001: TUI framework scaffold and base layout","description":"As a developer managing multiple agents I want a single `hive ui` command that opens a persistent terminal dashboard So that I can monitor all agents, read chat messages, and dispatch work without switching between multiple CLI commands","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:36Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:36Z"}

new_value: TUI framework scaffold already implemented: hive ui/tui command, ink+react framework, 3-panel layout, header, q/Ctrl+C exit, src/tui/ isolation. All quality gates pass.

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-hym","title":"Planning and Task Tracking","description":"A Beads-inspired planning and tracking system built into AgentHive. Provides a structured way to author task graphs with explicit dependencies, a queryable \"ready queue\" of actionable work, and live state tracking driven by the chat protocol. Replaces manual `hive dispatch` orchestration with a persistent, dependency-aware plan that auto-dispatches when predecessors complete. Storage starts as a JSON file with a clean abstraction layer; can migrate to Dolt for distributed conflict-free sync in a future version. Supersedes the basic task queue concept from the features backlog.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:31Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:31Z","external_ref":"prd:tasks/prd-planning.md"}

new_value: Full planning and task tracking system: data model, board view, task CRUD, ready queue, chat-driven state transitions, bulk import/export, dependency graph, dispatch, hierarchical grouping, analytics

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-hym.1","title":"US-001: Plan data model and storage","description":"As a developer orchestrating complex multi-task workflows I want a structured plan file that represents tasks as a dependency DAG with statuses So that the system can compute what's ready, what's blocked, and what's done without me tracking dependencies in my head","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:31Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:31Z"}

new_value: Already implemented in prior iteration (agenthive-hym). Verified: types, core logic, tests all present and passing.

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-07s.1","title":"US-001: Chat message timestamps","description":"As a developer reviewing agent activity I want every chat message to include an ISO 8601 timestamp So that `hive status` can show \"2m ago\", `hive tail` can show when things happened, and downstream features (notifications, cost-per-task) have temporal data","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:26Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:26Z"}

new_value: Added ISO 8601 timestamps to chat messages: updated wire format, parser (with backward compat), formatMessage, TUI ChatPanel, hive status relative time, and hive tail

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-07s","title":"Feature Improvements","description":"New capabilities for AgentHive organized by impact tier. Tier A addresses the biggest orchestration pain points observed during real multi-agent sessions (missing timestamps, no notifications, no orchestrated merge). Tier B improves daily quality-of-life (shell completions, installation script, transcript viewer, cost reporting). Tier C adds resilience and flexibility (session recovery, health watchdog, config profiles, post-init agent management). All features are additive — existing CLI behavior is preserved.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:25Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:25Z","external_ref":"prd:tasks/prd-features.md"}

new_value: Implemented US-002: Desktop notifications on agent events

old_value: {"id":"agenthive-9b5","title":"Agent Definition Templates","description":"Bundled agent prompt templates (`.claude/agents/\u003cname\u003e.md` files) that provide ready-to-use role definitions for Claude Code agents. Templates encode each role's identity, responsibilities, coding conventions, build/test gates, and the chat communication protocol. Users can install them during `hive init` or manage them later via `hive templates`. Templates are generic and framework-agnostic — they work on any repository.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:11Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:11Z","external_ref":"prd:tasks/prd-agent-templates.md"}

{"id":"agenthive-9b5.1","title":"US-001: Define the template format and directory structure","description":"As a contributor writing agent templates I want a documented, consistent template format with standard sections So that all templates follow the same structure and agents receive uniform coordination instructions","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"leogimenes1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:11Z","created_by":"Leonardo Gimenes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:27:11Z"}

new_value: Created templates/agents/ directory with 7 standardized agent templates (sre, frontend, backend, qa, appsec, devops, pm). Each template follows consistent format with 5 standard sections: Identity, Responsibilities, Workflow, Conventions, Communication Protocol. All templates reference HIVE_CHAT_FILE, HIVE_AGENT_NAME, HIVE_AGENT_ROLE env vars and include the chat message format with examples.
